summary: Warm audience recording that captures Phil’s bass nicely, offering a pleasant timbre.
review: The reviewer favors the Brotman/Metchick audience source for its nice timbre and the way it brings out Phil Lesh’s bass more clearly than comparable recordings. No comments are made about the musical performance itself, but the audio quality is described as very good overall.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single 4‑star review focusing on recording sound; positive remarks about timbre and bass capture suggest a solid but unverified rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Pleasant, slightly ear‑friendly timbre; captures Phil Lesh’s bass better than other audience sources; no major flaws mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details were provided in the review.

band_member_comments.Phil: Capture of Phil's bass noted as clearer and more present.
